name: LLaVA 1.5 7B
strengths: General image description, screenshots, UI mockups, simple diagram discussion.
notes: Baseline offline multimodal option. Requires llama-cpp-python with the llava native library available.

name: LLaVA 1.6 Mistral 7B
strengths: Sharper screenshot reasoning and stronger instruction following than LLaVA 1.5.
notes: Good target for an RTX 3070 laptop if quantized model and projector files are installed locally.

name: MiniCPM-V 2.6
strengths: Compact image Q&A, document screenshots, UI and code screenshot assistance.
notes: Efficient multimodal target for laptops when available in GGUF + projector form.

name: Qwen2.5-VL 7B
strengths: Document understanding, OCR-adjacent image reasoning, charts, diagrams, and screenshot Q&A.
notes: Preferred high-accuracy target when model files and the matching projector are installed locally.

name: Moondream 2
strengths: Fast lightweight visual captioning and simple image questions.
notes: Good fallback for speed. Prefer stronger models for precise code screenshot debugging.
